image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science reveals secrets about your internal clock that social media misses.
Context visual: Circadian genes control our sleep-wake cycles, influencing everything from mood to metabolism.
Escalation visual: When disrupted, these genes can lead to serious health issues. Imagine losing sleep over it.
Evidence visual: Studies show that our bodies thrive on routine. Light exposure at night? It confuses your genes.
Payoff visual: Understanding circadian rhythms can boost your health, energy, and mood dramatically.
Cta visual: Curious about how to reset your clock? Follow for tips on optimizing your circadian health!
